## Meeting Purpose

[Sync between GrowthX and Homebase teams to discuss content performance, workflow improvements, and address quality issues.](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Glossary content performing well, but deeper analytics needed for strategic insights](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Quality issues identified in TLDRs and "How to Start a Business" content, requiring immediate attention](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - [New Managing Editor joining GrowthX team, offering opportunity to improve processes and quality control](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Interlinking strategy needs refinement to maximize internal link potential](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Meeting Scheduling

  - [New Managing Editor starting at GrowthX, bringing experience from strategy sprints](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
  - [Fridays are typically busy for Homebase team; future syncs may be rescheduled](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Next week's call to include new Managing Editor introduction](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Glossary content showing positive growth in traffic and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Need for more detailed analytics:](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
      - [Page-level performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
      - [Cohort analysis by content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
      - [Delta tracking (week-over-week, month-over-month growth)](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=686.0)
  - [Custom Looker dashboard in development to provide deeper insights](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)

### Content Quality Issues

  - [TLDRs facing discrepancies between summaries and actual article content](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1208.0)
  - ["How to Start a Business" content lacking necessary depth and localization](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1513.0)
  - [Workflow gaps identified in quality control process before client review](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)

### Interlinking Strategy

  - [Current process links new content to existing pages](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1005.0)
  - [Opportunity to improve backward linking to newer content](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Plan to develop guide for systematic interlinking process](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)

### Competitor Mention Policy

  - [Direct competitors (e.g., Connect Team) mistakenly mentioned in content](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1431.0)
  - [Need to refresh and enforce "do not mention" list in content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Introduce new Managing Editor in next week's call](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1905.0)
  - [Prioritize fixing TLDR and "How to Start a Business" content issues](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1719.0)
  - [Develop and implement improved quality control process](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1637.0)
  - [Create guide for systematic interlinking](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1937.0)
  - [Update competitor "do not mention" list in knowledge base](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=1455.0)
  - [Investigate and resolve Notion page access issues](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [Schedule monthly deep-dive analytics sessions](https://fathom.video/share/ZHP7EEFjf7VZq1qMZxd_M_eZBr-HNiGW?tab=summary&timestamp=537.0)

action_items.description: Fix Notion page access for Homebase team
Prioritize/finish Looker dashboard setup for Homebase analytics
Create guide on interlinking strategies for Homebase team
Sync w/ new ME re TLDR & How to Start Business issues; review transcript
Submit ticket to fix TLDR content mismatch in Atlas
Update competitor list to avoid mentioning/linking in content
